3186260.name: Astro Tanto
3186260.description:
JOIN THE CLEANUP CREW

Welcome to AstroTanto, where the safety standards are low, but the orbit is high! You and your friends are the galaxy’s least-qualified sanitation engineers. Your mission? Turn dangerous orbital debris into a thriving home base, before gravity drags you down.

PHYSICS-BASED CHAOS

Movement in zero-G isn't graceful, it's a disaster! Master the art of clumsy flight as you float, bump, and crash through your shift. Trying to patch a hull breach? Duct-tape is your friend. Trying to pass a wrench? You just threw it into deep space.

ONE MAN'S TRASH IS YOUR SPACE STATION

Forget shiny sci-fi chrome. In AstroTanto, you build with what you find.

  • Vacuum up scrap, goo, and old satellites.

  • Recycle them into raw materials.

  • Print new modules and snap them onto your station like building blocks.

  • Need a bigger engine? Strap a rocket booster to the kitchen. Need more life support? Duct-tape a filter to the wall. If it holds air, it works!

SURVIVE THE SHIFT

Every round is a race against Orbital Decay. You have 10 minutes to grab the loot and stabilize your orbit before your ship burns up in the atmosphere.

  • The Wrangler: Wrangle giant debris chunks with your magnetic vacuum cleaner.

  • The Pilot: Fight the drift and keep the ship steady using manual thrusters.

  • The Engineer: Frantically repair the leaks caused by the Wrangler crashing debris into the hull.

KEY FEATURES

  • 1-4 Player Online Co-op: Scream instructions at your friends as you try to pilot a wobbly station together.

  • Dynamic Building: Expand your tiny pod into a massive, customized (and probably asymmetrical) space station.

  • Hazardous Physics: Everything interacts. Loose cargo becomes a projectile. Untethered friends become meteorites.

  • Goofy Gadgets: Master the Space Vacuum, the Tether Gun, and the always-reliable Astro-Duct-Tape.
